Imagery and mapSpain
Get Started

First steps with mapSpain.

Working with imagery

Learn how to include images on your maps.

Annex: Codes and names of the Spanish regions

Interactive explorer of the data included in the package.

mapSpain: Mapas de España en R [Spanish]

Mapas de España en R de manera rápida y sencilla.

About mapSpain

Developed by Diego Hernangómez.

Part of the rOpenSpain project.

About rOpenSpain

rOpenSpain is a community of R enthusiasts whose ultimate goal is to create high-quality R packages for data mining public Spanish open sources.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.9.

Template rostemplate by dieghernan, based on Bootstrapious.
